overview.problem: What needs to change and why.
overview.target_behavior: Observable behavior that will be true when this plan is complete.

in_scope: PA Agent files, modules, or behaviors this plan is allowed to change.
out_of_scope: Related work that should not be changed by this plan.

repo_paths: Relevant source, test, prompt, config, record, or documentation paths.
external_systems: AI providers, MT5, TradingView, yfinance, AkShare/East Money, display environment, or other external requirements.
credentials_or_local_state: Required API keys, settings, local terminals, records, or logs. Do not commit private values.
open_decisions: Questions that must be resolved before implementation can safely finish.

steps.description: Inspect current state and confirm baseline verification.

expected_changes: List concrete files, modules, prompts, docs, or tests expected to change.

steps.description: Run required verification and update durable artifacts.
expected_changes: ARCHITECTURE.md only if stable layers or dependency boundaries changed.
SESSION_HANDOFF.md if work remains unresolved or verification was skipped.
LESSON_PREFERENCE.md if a durable lesson or preference was learned.
verification: Feature-specific pytest, lint, GUI, web API, or live-service checks from SESSION_HANDOFF.md or this plan

required: List every command that must pass before this plan can be completed.
optional: List checks that are useful but environment-dependent, such as e2e, live provider, MT5, TradingView, or GUI manual smoke.

skipped.follow_up: Where or when it should be run.
